title: Khipro Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khipro with a Z-Score of +3.54. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The heat wave has resulted in a Critical Level alert with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is causing a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 11.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 69% and wind speed is 17.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Khipro.
